2016October 2, 2016

🇺🇸 Seattle, USA

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Seattle, United States, October 2, 2016 -- October 7, 2016

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2016-10-seattle-usa

14 Resolutions

939Plenary
Express concern over IEC TC 65 adoption of RAMI 4.0
SC 4 expresses concern over the IEC TC 65 work to adopt RAMI 4.0 as a PAS with undue haste contrary to the recommendation of the SAG-SM and the ISO TMB resolution 104/2016
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
938Plenary
Appoint SC 4 Liaison to ISO/TC 307
SC 4 appoints Jean Brange for a three-year term as the SC 4 Liaison to ISO/TC 307 Blockchain and electronic distributed ledger technologies, with appreciation for his offer to serve in that capacit...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
937Plenary
Establish 8-week ballot duration for ISO 10303 MoSSEC NP
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to apply the 8 week ballot duration to the NP for ISO 10303 MoSSEC.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
936Plenary
Establish 8-week ballot duration for ISO 18828-5 NP
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to apply the 8 week ballot duration to the NP for ISO 18828-5 on Manufacturing Change Management.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
935Plenary
Nominate SC 4 Chair-elect
SC 4 requests the Secretariat to nominate Kenny Swope from Boeing as the SC 4 Chair-elect, commencing January 2017, and to submit the required Chair nomination package to ANSI.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
934Plenary
Reappoint WG 12 Deputy Convenor
SC 4 appoints Jochen Haenisch as Deputy Convener for the WG 12 “STEP Product Modelling and Resources” for a further three year term, with appreciation for this offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
933Plenary
Reappoint SC 4 Implementation Forum Co-Deputy Convenor
SC 4 appoints Martin Hardwick as Co-Deputy Convener for the SC 4 Implementation Forum for a further three year term, with appreciation for his offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
932Plenary
Appoint Quality Committee Convenor
SC 4 appoints Hikmet Hussain as Convenor of the Quality Committee for a three year term, with appreciation for his offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
931Plenary
Approve Project Leaders and Project Editors for SC 4 Projects

Acclamation

Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its sincere thanks to Kenny Swope and our Boeing hosts for the excellent VIP tour of the Everett production facility.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
